name: Lead Generation System
problemStatement: Automates business listing extraction from Google Maps and converts them into verified email leads.
overview: This automated lead generation workflow extracts business listings from Google Maps, processes website URLs, scrapes emails directly from company websites, and exports clean, verified leads to Google Sheets.

name: Inventory ABC & Pareto Analysis
problemStatement: Performs automated ABC classification and demand analysis for optimized inventory management.
overview: This automated workflow analyzes transactional sales data from Google Sheets to perform ABC classification, Pareto analysis, multi-store sales breakdown, and demand variability assessment for effective inventory management.

name: Interior Design Lead Qualification
problemStatement: Automates lead scoring, drafting, and approval workflow with AI & human validation.
overview: This intelligent workflow automates the qualification, scoring, email drafting, and approval process for interior design leads — combining AI-powered decision-making with human-in-the-loop validation before final client communication and structured storage in Notion.
